title: Resolution Expressing Support to All Organizers of Community Pantries in the Municipality and Encouraging the Barangay Government Units Concerned to Extend Countenance for the Faithful Observance of Covid-19 Guidelines and Protocols During the Conduct of Community Pantries. (author: Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Co-author: Hon. Miko C. Pelegrina, Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Geronimo A. Ciceron, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Cris Dayril B.
